slices.title: Add note CRUD controls to approved mockup
slices.jtbd: When interacting with the design mockup, I want to see explicit controls for creating, editing, and deleting notes, so that the design completely reflects the required note management functionality.
slices.acceptanceCriteria:
Given the approved HTML mockup, When I view the interface, Then a Floating Action Button for creating new notes is present.
Given an existing note item in the mockup, When I examine its layout, Then explicit edit and delete buttons are visible.
slices.sixSigmaMetric: Decrease missing UI controls for note CRUD operations from 3 to 0
